description: 向小程序等派发刷新/推送类事件

failure_signals.pattern: scene: push_refresh - Mini program push refresh notify but config empty

lifecycle_signals.pattern: Delay timer triggered, starting event dispatch.

noise_patterns: Distribute the mini-program push refresh event to  %lu a li
Distribute mini-program push notifications to refresh.  onP
Reached maximum number of events (%ld)，Distribute immediate
Queue dispatches file update events; remaining queue length
